reviews.author: Yelp Customer
reviews.text: We recently had some issues with our AC all of the sudden, and the first couple of companies that came out told us we needed a new system. After many recommendations from neighbors, we called Bob's. Our technician Josh was super thorough in finding the actual issue. Saved us thousands.

reviews.author: Christopher Cobb
reviews.text: Josh was fantastic: professional, efficient, and went above and beyond. Couldn't ask for better service.

reviews.author: Hala Shell
reviews.text: Josh arrived the same day and within 30 minutes had our heat back up and running. Affordable and knowledgeable service.

reviews.author: Mike Dorman
reviews.text: We've been using Bob's Heating and Air exclusively for the past 5 years for a variety of HVAC needs.

reviews.author: Emmett O'Grady
reviews.text: Called Bob's first thing in the morning and shortly thereafter, I was up and running again!

reviews.author: Roswell Neighbor
reviews.text: Bob's Heating and Air has won the Nextdoor Fave 4 years in a row. Local small company, honest and fair.

reviews.author: Roswell Neighbor
reviews.text: Small honest and good work, not overpriced and pushy like the big companies.

reviews.author: Angi Customer
reviews.text: I recently had the most wonderful experience with Bob Roy of Bob's Heating and Air!

counts.total_available: 65 reviews aggregate across Google, Yelp, Nextdoor, Angi
